title: suggestions SSE Event
description: Delivers a batch of follow-up suggestions to display in the SprkChat suggestion bar after a model response. Suggestions are categorised as actions, questions, or insights.

suggestions.description: Ordered list of suggestions to display. Length must equal maxSuggestions.

suggestionId.description: Stable ID for telemetry and click-tracking.

text.description: The suggestion text displayed as a pill/button.

confidence.description: Model confidence score for relevance of this suggestion.

category.description: Category used to determine icon and ordering in the suggestion bar.

maxSuggestions.description: Expected number of suggestions in this event. Must match suggestions array length.
